speaker: MATT
raw_text: Anyone who wishes to immediately go into battle now, let's roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: On the Ice Storm Candle. All affected must make a dexterity saving throw, DC 12, or suffer 4d6 cold damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's a fail and a save. And it's half damage on success?

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: Half damage on success.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Great. Okay, so one of them failed and one of them saved. So go ahead and roll 4d6 damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Dang. I think that's a good way to start.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: Thank you, thank you, thank you. Oh boy. Three, six, nine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nine? Okay, nine and five cold damage to each. So (bang) it blasts open. Oh, and a dexterity check for your buddy, who makes it! So, Fatty Arbuckle actually walks out of there with a mere five points of cold damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Nice, Fatty!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Out of ice and frost. His busted-open rib cage, though, he did suffer...

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Super duper!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Putting on the Ritz!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Did suffer seven damage from the impact of this weapon. So Fatty Arbuckle, pretty damaged, but still standing there just going (snarling).

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: Keep standing, Fatty, you can do it! I love you, Fatty!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Is everyone just going to sit back at this, or--?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, we should probably attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's up to you. Or you can watch this horrible bludgeoning of this skeleton in the teeth of death.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: When I see the salamander take out the big, shiny sharp thing, I go into a rage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I hide.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Travis, I assume you're going to be rushing in there, then?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.
